title: V1KafkaPrincipalAcl
description: Describe allowed or denied ACL operations for a Kafka resource.

operations.description: List of ACL operations e.g., ALL, READ, WRITE, CREATE, DELETE, etc.

type.description: The ACL permission type, i.e., ALLOW or DENY.

host.description: The host address from which the principal is allowed or denied.

V1KafkaResourceMatcher.description: Match a Kafka resource by type and name pattern.

type.description: The resource type, i.e., TOPIC, GROUP.

pattern.description: A literal name, a prefix, or a regex pattern for matching the resource.

patternType.description: The pattern type, i.e., LITERAL, PREFIX, MATCH.
